sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68341" key="molossi/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολοσσίαμβος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῐ]</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, the foot <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">̄̄̄̆̄</pron>, Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0022.tlg002:p.481" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.481</biblScope> </bibl> K.</entryFree>
